overview: A mobile-first French vocabulary and phrases flashcard app. Add your own French words and phrases, study them with flip cards, quizzes, matching games, and writing practice — and track your progress over time.
features: Card fields: French term, English translation, phonetic pronunciation, part-of-speech, example sentence
5 study modes: flip cards, learn, test, match, write
Pre-loaded beginner French vocabulary and common phrases sample decks
Study session history with accuracy tracking
Mobile-first responsive design with French Tricolore color theme
